title: 8 Christmas Crackers Xylophone Set - Musical Mini Orchestra Party Pack Family Kids & Adults - Fun Novelty Xmas Cracker Box Hat & Motto - 12" Recyclable Crackers Holiday Table Decoration
features: Festive Family Fun - Add laughter and music to your celebrations with these musical Christmas crackers, great family crackers for kids and adults that bring everyone together around the table.

Interactive Musical Game - Each cracker includes a hat, snap, Xylophone key and wooden hammer, plus a music sheet with playing instructions creating novelty Christmas crackers for adults and children that double as after-dinner entertainment.

High Quality - Each 12" Xmas cracker is crafted from strong paper with a bright finish and crisp snap. Designed by Harvey & Mason, these premium Christmas crackers offer quality construction and festive presentation.
Vibrant Colours - Rainbow stripes and musical note motifs make these fun Christmas crackers a standout Christmas table decoration, adding colour to your festive party decor.
Eco Friendly Choice - Fully recyclable premium Christmas crackers, ideal as holiday accessories or Christmas stocking fillers. Enjoy festive fun while making a more sustainable holiday choice.
description: Bring festive sound and colour to your Christmas celebrations with the Harvey & Mason set of Luxury Xmas Crackers. Each box includes 8 Christmas Crackers (12" / 30 x 5 cm) designed to fill your table with music, laughter and bright decoration. These Christmas Crackers unique in style and design are perfect for family celebrations, adding a playful touch to your Christmas table decoration. Inside every cracker you'll find a hat, motto, snap, xylophone key and wooden hammer - everything you need for fun after dinner. The included music sheet of Christmas classics such as O Come All Ye Faithful turns these Novelty Christmas Crackers for adults and kids into a lively game for the whole family. Beautifully finished by Harvey & Mason, these Premium Christmas Crackers feature vibrant musical note artwork and a smooth paper construction for a satisfying snap. The bright, multicolour design brings a cheerful look to your Christmas table decor and complements any festive party decor or dining setting. Each cracker is made from recyclable materials, offering style without waste. These Recyclable Christmas Crackers are a sustainable choice for those who want Fun Christmas Crackers with eco appeal. Perfect Kids Christmas Crackers or Family Crackers for gatherings, they're ideal holiday accessories that combine festive spirit, colour and music for a celebration everyone will remember.
